name: step0-env-setup
description: Reusable step0 environment setup scaffolder for remote conda/R bioinformatics projects.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize reproducible remote conda/R step0 setup workflows.
interface.longDescription: Step0 Env Setup generates a project-local, logged, monitorable environment setup workflow from centralized templates. It favors bootstrap-only conda creation, isolated condarc handling, per-package R installation logs, one-by-one fallback, and remote-safe launch/check scripts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use step0-env-setup to initialize or validate a reusable step0 environment setup workflow.
